scope: 10-run hidden verifier loop for baseline expected-failure, reference, and fresh solver rerun patches

expectedOutcomes.baseline_expected_failure: all runs should fail hidden verifier
expectedOutcomes.reference_solution: all runs should pass hidden verifier
expectedOutcomes.kimi_fresh_rerun: all runs should pass hidden verifier
expectedOutcomes.minimax_fresh_rerun: all runs should pass hidden verifier
expectedOutcomes.gpt_fresh_rerun: all runs should pass hidden verifier

limitations: Hidden verifier loop only; raw logs are restricted evaluator-only.
